case_title: CORINNA KAARLELA VS. POST AND LINTEL, INC.

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY KAARLELA, CORINNA POST AND LINTEL, INC.
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-30-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-01-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2018 BY VISITING JUDGE DIANNE PEEBLES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CORINNA KAARLELA. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT POST AND LINTEL'S REPRESENTATIVE, JONATHAN HERRERA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2018 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KAARLELA, CORINNA AS TO DEFENDANT POST AND LINTEL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 65.00 - SERVED MAR-28-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT POST AND LINTEL, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT POST AND LINTEL, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KAARLELA, CORINNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POST AND LINTEL, INC. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,140.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE AND RE: CHANGE OF DEFENDANT'S BUSINESS ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAARLELA, CORINNA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT POST AND LINTEL, INC.
